## Methods

### `getAllItems() => Promise<Element[]>`

Gets all slotted menu items, ignoring dividers and other elements.

#### Returns

Type: `Promise<Element[]>`




## Slots

| Slot | Description                                                          |
| ---- | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
|      | The menu's content, including menu items, menu labels, and dividers. |
